title: Hiring Medical Officer at Ruby Hall Clinic

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Ruby Hall Clinic
jsonLd.description:
Ruby Hall Clinic, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ruby Hall Clinic:
Ruby Hall Clinic is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ruby Hall Clinic!
